Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 45 

COMMENT: From 2009–2014, this value was expanded from 1 to 2-btyes. This variable was retired and did not 
appear in the 2015 Plan Base File; however, the same information is available in the Plan Tier file (see 
GAP_TIER_DRUG_TYPE). 

The coverage gap is technically referred to as the initial coverage limit (ICL) for the Part D benefit. 

The CCW constructs the Plan
